content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: low volatility environment (Vol: 18.6%) with mixed breadth (3/8 sectors positive), supporting selective risk-taking and momentum trades.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Technology & Telecom leading: KONTR (1W: +60.22% | 1M: -1.81%) RECOVERY, TCELL (1W: +0.37% | 1M: -1.54%) RECOVERY. Energy & Chemicals showing breadth: TUPRS (1W: +8.43% | 1M: +14.73%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +8.97% | 1M: -1.92%) RECOVERY.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking & Finance is weakest: AKBNK (1W: -7.96% | 1M: -6.82%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -5.24% | 1M: -6.77%) BELOW TREND. Transportation also lagging: PGSUS (1W: -5.38% | 1M: -3.84%) BELOW TREND, TAVHL (1W: -4.68% | 1M: -5.55%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +60.22% | 1M: -1.81%) RECOVERY, SASA (1W: +8.97% | 1M: -1.92%) RECOVERY, TUPRS (1W: +8.43% | 1M: +14.73%) ABOVE TREND, VESTL (1W: +5.80% | 1M: +5.97%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +5.43% | 1M: +2.01%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
ASELS (1W: -12.26% | 1M: -5.05%) BELOW TREND, GUBRF (1W: -10.59% | 1M: -14.05%) BELOW TREND, HALKB (1W: -10.18% | 1M: -13.65%) BELOW TREND, YKBNK (1W: -8.97% | 1M: -10.50%) BELOW TREND, AKBNK (1W: -7.96% | 1M: -6.82%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +60.22% | 1M: -1.81%) RECOVERY, SASA (1W: +8.97% | 1M: -1.92%) RECOVERY, TUPRS (1W: +8.43% | 1M: +14.73%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: -12.26% | 1M: -5.05%) BELOW TREND — large moves on both sides, trade with size discipline.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks remain weak and vulnerable to sentiment: AKBNK (1W: -7.96% | 1M: -6.82%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -5.24% | 1M: -6.77%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -4.46% | 1M: -4.26%) BELOW TREND, YKBNK (1W: -8.97% | 1M: -10.50%) BELOW TREND, HALKB (1W: -10.18% | 1M: -13.65%) BELOW TREND — avoid fresh long exposure until stabilization.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Mixed industrials: VESTL (1W: +5.80% | 1M: +5.97%) ABOVE TREND and EREGL (1W: -1.59% | 1M: +3.81%) CORRECTION show pockets of strength, while ASELS (1W: -12.26% | 1M: -5.05%) BELOW TREND and FROTO (1W: -0.55% | 1M: -5.94%) BELOW TREND signal sector dispersion.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy leaders running: TUPRS (1W: +8.43% | 1M: +14.73%) ABOVE TREND and PETKM (1W: +5.10% | 1M: +2.11%) ABOVE TREND; but GUBRF (1W: -10.59% | 1M: -14.05%) BELOW TREND highlights idiosyncratic downside — favor top quant names and avoid weak credits.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-on stance: overweight Technology & Telecom and selective Energy names (TUPRS, PETKM, KONTR) while underweight Banking and Transportation; use tight stops and size for high-volatility names given mixed breadth.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
KONTR (1W: +60.22% | 1M: -1.81%) RECOVERY for momentum follow-through, TUPRS (1W: +8.43% | 1M: +14.73%) ABOVE TREND for earnings/oil sensitivity, SASA (1W: +8.97% | 1M: -1.92%) RECOVERY for sector flows, AKBNK (1W: -7.96% | 1M: -6.82%) BELOW TREND as a bellwether for bank sentiment.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Technology & Telecom for continuation or mean-reversion in KONTR, Energy & Chemicals for oil/earnings correlation, Banking & Finance for risk sentiment and FX/CPI sensitivity.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 reaction to global risk (US CPI/PMI) and local FX moves; catalysts: oil price moves, quarterly earnings from TUPRS/PETKM, and any central bank or macro updates that could widen bank dispersion.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Low-volatility RISK-ON market with mixed sector participation; momentum sits in Technology & Energy while banks and transport lag. Favor selective longs in TUPRS/KONTR/PETKM and stay underweight core banks until breadth and credit signals improve.
